center.name: 迈阿密-戴德县
center.summary: 迈阿密-戴德县是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括藍黃金剛鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A small breeding population descended from introduced birds is found in Puerto Rico, and another has inhabited Miami-Dade County, Florida, since the mid-1980s.Krishnan, Karunya
